hero.subtitle: Whether you're using Excel sheets, notebooks, registers, or WhatsApp messages, FlatLedger helps apartment societies manage maintenance, expenses, and records in one secure place.
hero.badge: Designed for apartment societies with 10–50 flats
hero.teluguBadge: Designed for apartment societies with 10–50 flats
hero.socialProof: Now in Early Access — Be among the first
hero.microcopy: No credit card required. 30-day free trial.

trust.title: Why Societies Trust FlatLedger
trust.subtitle: Built with security, reliability, and simplicity at its core.

items.title: Encrypted & Secure
items.description: Your society's financial data is encrypted at rest and in transit. We never share your data.

items.title: Daily Backups
items.description: Automatic daily backups so your records are always safe — even if something goes wrong.

items.title: Role-Based Access
items.description: Admins have full control. Viewers get read-only access. No accidental changes.

items.title: Quick to Set Up
items.description: Add your flats, configure dues, and generate your first bill — all in under 15 minutes.

earlyAccess.title: Everything You Need for Maintenance Management
earlyAccess.subtitle: Everything needed to manage maintenance billing and expenses for your apartment society.

items.title: Built for small societies
items.description: Designed specifically for apartment societies with 10–50 flats.

items.title: Offline Payment Recording
items.description: Record cash, UPI, and bank transfer payments as they happen.

items.title: Defaulter Reports
items.description: See who owes what — instantly. Download the defaulter list anytime.

problem.body1: Managing society finances shouldn't take hours every month. Between Excel sheets and manual tracking — things get messy fast.
problem.body2: FlatLedger simplifies everything into one easy system.

features.subtitle: FlatLedger helps you save time, reduce mistakes, and keep records organized.

billing.title: Save Hours Every Month
billing.description: Generate maintenance bills and track collections in minutes.

payments.title: Track Dues Instantly
payments.description: Know who has paid and who has pending dues at any time.

expenses.title: Keep Records Organized
expenses.description: Store maintenance, expenses, and society records in one place.

finances.title: Easy Reports
finances.description: Generate reports without manual calculations and paperwork.

reports.title: Smooth Committee Handover
reports.description: Society records stay with the society, not on someone's laptop.

roles.title: Reduce Manual Mistakes
roles.description: Avoid errors caused by spreadsheets, notebooks, and manual calculations.

howItWorks.title: Set up your society in 3 simple steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Add members, generate bills, and start managing payments.

steps.title: Add flats and residents
steps.description: Import residents from Excel or add manually.

steps.title: Generate maintenance bills
steps.description: Create bills for all flats in one click.

steps.title: Track payments
steps.description: See collections, expenses, and pending dues.

pricing.subtitle1: Per society, not per flat. Designed for small apartment committees.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about your free trial, billing, and support.

items.q: Can I use FlatLedger for a small apartment?
items.a: Yes. FlatLedger works well for apartments with 10–50 flats. It is designed specifically for small, self-managed apartment societies.
Currently one society per account. Each society gets its own dashboard, billing, and reports.
Maintenance payments are recorded manually — cash, UPI, or bank transfer. You record what residents pay directly to the society account. Simple and fully under your committee's control.
Yes, every society gets a 30-day free trial with full access to all features — billing, payments, expenses, and reports. No credit card required.
Plans are based on the number of flats in your society. Choose the tier that fits your apartment size.
Yes. You can enter your flat list and opening balances directly, or copy them from your existing Excel sheet. Most societies are set up and billing within 30 minutes.
Yes. FlatLedger uses encrypted data storage, role-based access control, and regular backups. Only your committee members can access your society's data. We do not share data with any third party.

items.q: Can we export our data anytime?
items.a: Yes. Bills, payment records, and reports can be exported to CSV at any time. Your data is always yours — you are never locked in.

items.q: Can I import my existing Excel data?
items.a: Yes. You can import your flats and residents from Excel.

finalCta.title: Ready to Simplify Society Management?
finalCta.subtitle: Spend less time managing records and more time improving your community.
finalCta.supporting:
No Credit Card Required.
Setup in Minutes.

footer.tagline: Simplifying housing society finances across India
footer.supportingText: Simple maintenance management for apartment societies.
